text: Moving from the quiet, sterile environment of the meeting room hallway to the stimulating, colorful space of the R+D exhibit, I feel a shift in my mood. Here in this second space, surrounded by visual information and creativity, I feel energized and curious. The vibrancy of the display reminds me of the endless possibilities that arise when human minds are set loose in the pursuit of knowledge and invention. I am inspired, and a bit in awe of the blend of order and imagination present here.
